meaning: n.鐪嬪畧鐩戠嫳鐨勪汉,鐙卞崚
examples: "In that case you also are free," said the Jailer.
"If the others go, I go, too," said Pinocchio to the Jailer.
Their goal was to turn the public against Binyamin Netanyahu - Schalit's imaginary jailer.
Even the chief jailer admits that many of his prisoners are associated with poaching only in marginal ways.
